name: Buttermilk Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
-- OPTIONAL
~------------------------------------------------------
~------------- ~- IN A LARGE BOWL COMBINE FLOUR, SUGAR, CINNAMON, GROUND CLOVES, SALT AND BAKING SODA. CUT IN BUTTER UNTIL MIXTURE IS CRUMBLY. SAVE ONE CUP OF THE Mixture FOR TOPPING. STIR IN BUTTERMILK, MIXING UNTIL WELL COMBINED. ADD RAISINS OR NUTS IF DESIRED. POUR INTO GREASED PAN (9 inches X 13 inches) AND SPRINKLE WITH TOPPING. BAKE AT 325 DEG F FOR 1 HOUR OR UNTIL TOOTHPICK COMES OUT CLEAN. THIS COFFEE CAKE CAN BE MADE AHEAD AND FROZEN. KEEPS WELL WHEN FROZEN.
